allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const png=fs.readFileSync\('public/assets/curtain-mask.png'\); const w=png.readUInt32BE\(16\),h=png.readUInt32BE\(20\); console.log\('curtain-mask.png size:', w, 'x', h\); const shadow=fs.readFileSync\('public/assets/curtain-shadow.png'\); const sw=shadow.readUInt32BE\(16\),sh=shadow.readUInt32BE\(20\); console.log\('curtain-shadow.png size:', sw, 'x', sh\); const folds=fs.readFileSync\('public/assets/door-curtain-folds.png'\); const fw=folds.readUInt32BE\(16\),fh=folds.readUInt32BE\(20\); console.log\('door-curtain-folds.png size:', fw, 'x', fh\);")
